- skills/branding/*.md - Branding knowledge (colors, fonts, voice, logo handling)
- instructions/branding-agent.md - Branding agent procedure
- skills/integration/*.md - Integration query skills (GA4, Stripe, HubSpot, etc.)
- instructions/integration-agent.md - Integration agent procedure
